     The Numbers Business Report

Super 8 (2011)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $127,004,179Details
International Box Office $130,968,566
Worldwide Box Office $257,972,745
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $20,062,473
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $16,984,697
Total $37,047,170
Further financial details...

Synopsis

In the summer of 1979, a group of friends in a small Ohio town witness a catastrophic train crash while making a super 8 movie and soon suspect that it was not an accident. Shortly after, unusual disappearances and inexplicable events begin to take place in town, and the local Deputy tries to uncover the truth - something more terrifying than any of them could have imagined.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$35,451,168 (27.9% of total gross)
Legs:3.58 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:49.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$50,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,379 opening theaters/3,424 max. theaters, 5.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $191,547,282

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 9th, 2011 (Special Engagement) by Paramount Pictures
June 10th, 2011 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
Video Release: November 22nd, 2011 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense sequences of sci-fi action and violence, language and some drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2174, 6/1/2011)
Running Time: 112 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Ensemble, Epilogue
Film format: IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Coming of Age, Conspiracy Theory, Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, Disaster, Dysfunctional Family, First Contact, Monster, Rescue, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Social setting: Alien Invasion, Last Day of School, Movie Business
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Time period setting: 1970s
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Amblin Entertainment, Bad Robot
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

In the summer of 1979, a group of friends in a small Ohio town witness a catastrophic train crash while making a super 8 movie and soon suspect that it was not an accident. Shortly after, unusual disappearances and inexplicable events begin to take place in town, and the local Deputy tries to uncover the truth - something more terrifying than any of them could have imagined.
